items.label: Assessment
items.value: The step 'Validate persona scenario #4' requires confirmation of the scenario behavior regarding the audit trail between 'AI agent' and human actor. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API interactions or results that demonstrate this functionality. The existing evidence focuses on other aspects of the saga lifecycle but does not address the specific requirement of capturing the audit trail, leading to an inconclusive validation.
